title: Veridion Design Proposal Metadata
description: Metadata schema for YAML front matter extracted from Veridion Design Proposal Markdown files. Proposal body content is intentionally out of scope.

identifier.description: The proposal identifier. Standard proposals use VDP-0000 format. VDP--001 is the single reserved bootstrap identifier for the proposal-system specification.

status.description: The current lifecycle status of the proposal.

format_version.description: The Veridion Proposal System format version used by the document.

reviewers.description: The proposal reviewers. This array may be empty until reviewers are known.

created.description: The proposal creation date as an ISO 8601 calendar date.

updated.description: The proposal last update date as an ISO 8601 calendar date.

dependencies.description: VDP identifiers that this proposal depends on.

supersedes.description: VDP identifiers that this proposal supersedes.

superseded_by.description: The direct replacement VDP identifier, or null when no direct replacement exists.

vdpIdentifier.description: A standard VDP identifier or the reserved VDP--001 bootstrap identifier.
